subject: Route change — NOLA-20-0001
body: Customer moved the Katy delivery to the afternoon. Please start the run after 1 PM and call ahead. Thanks.

subject: Gate code for delivery
body: Hi — the yard gate code is 4821. Forklift is on site if you need it. Ask for Manny.

subject: Fuel card updated
body: Your fuel card PIN was reset. New PIN is in the driver portal under Settings.
